title: Gateway Volatility Arbitrage Feasibility

strategy.name: Volatility Quote Lag Arbitrage
strategy.mechanism: Sell BTC on Gateway at stale high price during crash, or buy BTC at stale low price during pump
strategy.bestRoute: BTC→Base USDC (sell during crash) — lowest exec cost ratio
strategy.keyAssumption: Gateway holds quoted price during 6-9 min BTC settlement window
unverified: Gateway quote update frequency during volatility
Whether Gateway rejects transactions when market moves during settlement
Actual Gateway quote staleness during macro events
Whether Gateway has dynamic slippage protection

verdict.calmMarket: NO_OPPORTUNITY — Gateway 0.645% spread kills all routes
verdict.volatileMarket: UNPROVEN — needs 1%+ crash with Gateway lag to be viable at $250
verdict.recommendation: Continue 5-min collection, increase frequency during macro events

nextSteps: Keep collector running at 5-min intervals (PID active)
Monitor for upcoming CPI/Fed/FOMC events — increase to 30-sec intervals
After first volatile period: analyze quote lag behavior
If lag confirmed: build quote-lock + execution flow
If no lag: conclude strategy unviable, explore CEX-Gateway hybrid
